title: Sweet Shop Management System
summary: A full-stack role-based sweet shop management platform with inventory tracking, payment processing, and granular access control across three user roles.
description: A full-stack web application for managing a sweet shop's inventory, users, roles, and payments with JWT authentication, Google SSO, email verification, and PDF reporting.
outcomes: Built a granular RBAC system with three distinct roles — Admin, Staff, and Customer — each with permission-gated features
Implemented secure JWT authentication with access/refresh token rotation, email verification, and Google SSO
Designed a staff approval workflow where admins review accounts before granting inventory edit permissions
Developed inventory management with real-time stock tracking, production task assignment, and printable PDF reports
